traits.name: Extra Language
traits.text: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.text: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.text: Advantage on saves against being charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.text: You meditate 4 hours instead of sleeping 8 for a long rest.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.text: Advantage on saves against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.text: Add double proficiency to History checks about stonework.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.text: Proficiency with battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.
